videos.headline: Gouweleeuw's goal enough for Augsburg vs. Dortmund
videos.title: Gouweleeuw's goal enough for Augsburg vs. Dortmund
videos.caption: Augsburg secure all three points vs. Borussia Dortmund, thanks to a brilliant Jeffery Gouweleeuw header.
videos.description: Augsburg secure all three points vs. Borussia Dortmund, thanks to a brilliant Jeffery Gouweleeuw header.

tracking.trackingName: SOC_One-Play (Borussia Dortmund vs. FC Augsburg - Game Highlights) 2025/03/08 ESHEET

videos.headline: Anthony Modeste's first-half header lifts Dortmund to victory
videos.title: Anthony Modeste's first-half header lifts Dortmund to victory
videos.caption: Dortmund tallies its 10th goal of the season by its 10th different goalscorer in a 1-0 win over Hertha Berlin.
videos.description: Dortmund tallies its 10th goal of the season by its 10th different goalscorer in a 1-0 win over Hertha Berlin.

tracking.trackingName: SOC_One-Play (Borussia Dortmund Highlights Hertha Berlin) 2022/08/27 ESHEET

videos.headline: Furth, Cologne each get 2nd half goals in 1-1 draw
videos.title: Furth, Cologne each get 2nd half goals in 1-1 draw
videos.caption: Florian Kainz gets the tap in early in the second half for Cologne, then Furth equalizes on the Sebastian Griesbeck header off the corner.
videos.description: Florian Kainz gets the tap in early in the second half for Cologne, then Furth equalizes on the Sebastian Griesbeck header off the corner.

tracking.trackingName: SOC_Highlight (Furth, Cologne each get 2nd half goals in 1-1 draw) 2022/02/26 ESHEET

videos.headline: Cologne's winless Bundesliga run drags on in Mainz draw
videos.title: Cologne's winless Bundesliga run drags on in Mainz draw
videos.caption: Cologne is winless in five Bundesliga games, but comes from behind to earn a point against Mainz.
videos.description: Cologne is winless in five Bundesliga games, but comes from behind to earn a point against Mainz.

tracking.trackingName: INET_SOC GER Highlight (Cologne’s winless Bundesliga run drags on in Mainz draw) 2021/11/21 US ONLY
